title: Document wrapper self-validation caveat
goal: Add a concise guide note that when modifying run-generator.mjs or run-validator-a.mjs themselves, operators should avoid relying only on the same wrapper as its own validator and should use fixture/local checks first, with a follow-up real pipeline smoke test when needed.
success_criteria: Generator guide documents the self-validation caveat for run-generator.mjs changes.
Validator guide documents the self-validation caveat for run-validator-a.mjs changes.
No code or schema behavior changes are made.

negative: Do not include secrets, credentials, or environment variable values.
